title: Cobblemon Academy Integration
body:
Cobblemon Academy Integration is a custom integration companion mod for the Cobblemon Academy modpack. This mod is specifically crafted to bridge features from multiple mods within the pack and add new cobblemon related features ensuring a cohesive and enhanced gameplay experience.

It is not recommended to download this mod on its own, as it is already included in the Cobblemon Academy modpack and does not work on its own without the modpack's dependencies. Any updates to this mod will always be included in the latest release of the modpack.

You can find the full modpack [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/cobblemon-academy).
